title: primula × loiseleurii
intro: Primula × loiseleurii, also known as the Loiseleur's primrose or primrose root, is a hybrid plant species in the primrose family (Primulaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Primula × loiseleurii include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
